sampled_assertions.claim: Accountability = named person expected to answer for outcome
Four-level chain: developer/deployer/operator/end user with scope annotations
Deployer cannot fully pass accountability to developer
Pre-decision naming = safety check; post-failure = blame allocation
'For any AI system you evaluate, name who is accountable' — A3 application note
